taxonomy: Aria nivea acutifolia is classified under the plant family Annonaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the custard apple or soursop family. Aria nivea acutifolia belongs to the genus Aria, which is a part of the Annonaceae family. The classification of Aria nivea acutifolia is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida.
